name: Barksdale
description_short: Barksdale Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving Louisiana, East Texas, and Arkansas with over 30 locations and a routing number 311175093.
description_long:
Barksdale Federal Credit Union (BFCU) is the largest locally owned credit union in Louisiana, operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. The organization serves communities across Louisiana, East Texas, and Arkansas with a network of over 30 physical branch locations, positioning it as a significant regional financial cooperative. As a federal credit union, it is NCUA-insured, providing members with the security and regulatory protections standard to the credit union system.

BFCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including checking and savings accounts, auto loan refinancing, mortgage services, student checking accounts, credit cards (with rewards programs), and online banking capabilities. The institution emphasizes accessibility through multiple service channels, including traditional in-branch banking, online banking, video chat consultation (Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST), and automated telephone banking. Members can access the Barksdale Rewards loyalty program and eClub services, along with a mortgage center for home financing needs.

The credit union distinguishes itself through its regional focus as Louisiana's largest locally owned credit union, community engagement through scholarships and community events, and modern service delivery options including video chat banking and live teller machine video services. The organization maintains robust fraud prevention communication, actively alerting members about phone spoofing scams and providing multiple dedicated fraud reporting lines. Co-op shared branching access extends member convenience beyond direct locations.

Based on available website information, BFCU operates as a legitimate, established regional credit union with standard consumer financial services. Limitations in the provided website content prevent detailed assessment of interest rates, fee structures, membership eligibility requirements, or specific loan approval criteria. Prospective members should contact BFCU directly at 318-549-8145 or 800-647-2328 to evaluate specific products, rates, and terms against their financial needs.
services: Credit cards with Barksdale Rewards program
Lobby appointments for loan and account applications
pros: Over 30 physical branch locations across Louisiana, East Texas, and Arkansas for convenient access
NCUA-insured member accounts providing standard credit union protections
Video chat banking available Monday-Friday 8AM-5PM CST for remote account services
Largest locally owned credit union in Louisiana with established regional reputation
Multiple service channels including online banking, automated phone banking, and in-branch lobby appointments
Barksdale Rewards loyalty program and member benefits (eClub)
Dedicated fraud prevention with multiple reporting lines and active scam alerts
cons: Website does not disclose specific interest rates, APRs, or fees for products
Limited information on membership eligibility requirements or account opening process details
Video chat service limited to Monday-Friday business hours only
No loan approval criteria, minimum deposit amounts, or product-specific terms disclosed on website
Routing number visible but specific account types and their features not comprehensively documented
best_for: Louisiana, East Texas, and Arkansas residents seeking local credit union services with regional branch access
Members prioritizing community-based financial institutions and locally owned credit unions
Consumers who value multiple banking channels including video chat and online services
Those seeking auto refinancing, mortgage services, and comprehensive consumer banking products
diagnosis: Barksdale Federal Credit Union is best suited for residents within its service areas (Louisiana, East Texas, Arkansas) seeking membership in a large, established credit union with extensive branch access and multiple service delivery options. The primary caveat is that specific product rates, fees, and membership eligibility criteria are not disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact for detailed financial comparison and qualification assessment.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
